title: coprosma atropurpurea
intro: Coprosma atropurpurea, also known as Purple Correa or Purple Coprosma, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Coprosma atropurpurea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Coprosma atropurpurea are typically made from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
